data.content: Plan review rejected: the plan targets the wrong production rendering path. `render_prompt_body()` is called from `src/installed_workflows/compatibility.rs`, while `src/poll_claim.rs` and `src/action_prompt.rs` consume already-rendered profile prompts. `shipment_review.md` already has output-conditional sections, and the existing prompt-variant coverage lives in prompt-resolution and poll-claim tests rather than `src/loom_compat_bundle.rs`. Also, the proposed `merged_main`/`live_deployment` target work depends on canonical output targets from c8f4, which are not present in the current tree.
